Q2 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

A transfer function with unity dc gain has three poles at –1, –2 and –3 and no finite zeros. A plant with this transfer function is connected with a proportional controller of gain K in the forward path, in a unity feedback configuration. The transfer function is given by

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
We eliminate (a) and (d) which suggest existence of poles in the RHP. We also rule out option (b) which consist of zero at the origin. Hence, option (c) is the correct answer with unity dc gain (at s = 0) and poles at s = –1, –2 and –3.

The value of b for which the loci of all the three roots of the closed loop characteristic equation meet at a single point is _________.

NAT
Correct answer: 2.22
Solution

Q9 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following components are commonly found in feedback control system?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, b, d)
• In control systems, error detectors are used to sense and measure any error, which may occur due to the difference between the actual output and the desired output.
• Sensors or transducers are devices which convert physical changes like change in temperature, pressure and etc into electrical signals. It provide feedback to controllers so that the process continues and reach the desired result.
• The controller generates control signals to reduce the deviation.
• Actuators are used to implement the actions which are determined by controller. They convert the control system received from controller into physical actions.
